_meta.purpose: void SSoT — layers, blockers, next steps

features.tabs: Cmd+T new / Cmd+W close / Cmd+1~9,Cmd+0 switch (10 slots) / Cmd+Ctrl+0~9 profile / click switch / left tab bar 140px
features.profiles: ~/.void/profiles.json — key 0~9, title/path/cmd, title dedup (name / name (2)), auto-seeded template on first run
features.activity_indicator: background tabs polled each tick, PTY drain prevents shell stall, orange dot in tab bar + NSDockTile badge count on unread tabs (cleared on activation)
features.scrollback: section-based (32 × 64 lines = 2048 max), lazy-alloc 410KB/section, oldest freed on ring wrap, scroll wheel + Shift+PageUp/Down
features.resize: window resize → TIOCSWINSZ to all PTYs, screen buffer reinit
features.damage_tracking: set_cell equal-exit + dirty row range → setNeedsDisplay:YES full-view redraw (macOS 15+ layer-backed view backing store 미보존 대응)
features.resource_isolation: per-child setrlimit RLIMIT_NOFILE=4096 / RLIMIT_AS=4GB, setsid, optional per-profile cpu/mem/nice caps
features.memory_safety: drawRect @autoreleasepool + NSAttributedString release + cached bold font + ANSI color cache (fixes Terminal.app-style heap pressure)

next: glyph atlas (Core Text 대신 pre-rendered bitmap cache)
